curation_notes: Patch commit is a merge of the security advisory fix into apple/swift-nio-http2. The primary vulnerability is in the decodeInteger function in Sources/NIOHPACK/IntegerCoding.swift, which performed unchecked multiplication and addition during HPACK variable-length integer decoding. The fix adds overflow-reporting arithmetic operations and throws a new UnrepresentableInteger error on overflow. HPACKErrors.swift was also modified but only to add the new error type. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern; other files in the NIOHPACK module (HuffmanCoding, HPACKDecoder, etc.) use different decoding logic. Pre-assigned class integer-overflow from CWE-190 is correct.
